projects.content: Community platform (Next.js). Close to shipping but has been haphazard — scope kept expanding. Path to v1: drop remaining unfinished features behind feature flags, focus on App Store requirements (leg
pub check-in app (Angular/Firebase/Capacitor). On hold until LocalShout alpha ships.

AI assistant. Daily briefing pipeline running well. Hermes framework is maturing and genuinely exciting — seen as the main accelerant for all projects once LocalShout ships. Currently: model of Marvin
Dating parked until post-LocalShout launch. Wants to date from confidence (having shipped) rather than aspirationally. Recent potential date: no inclination to follow up.
Application started but stalled. Two hours of admin work. Keeps getting forgotten — needs a nudge.

Feeling invisible and restless. Airbnb guest staying long-term opens subletting possibility. No concrete plan yet but the feeling is strong. Apps can be finished anywhere. Not a commitment — legitimis
